## Checklist

- [ ] `skin.json` complete with all required fields
- [ ] All colors as CSS variables in `:root`
- [ ] Custom vars use `--skin-*` prefix
- [ ] Every `::before`/`::after` has `pointer-events: none`
- [ ] No `background` on `.moltamp-vibes`
- [ ] No external URLs or `@import`
- [ ] Assets under limits (5MB/file, 20MB total)
- [ ] `preview.png` included
- [ ] Tested: right-click menus, resize handles, panel toggles
